A meeting Of the committee Of

Gil will he held Sunday afternoon,

The fight for the exposition of Of

same, whether the judges have a
grand jury or not. This investiea-

tended to the judicial arm of the
county government, as some things
have transpired in this respect in
late years that needs looking into.
